title: Feeding difficulty

investigations.text: Specifies weight and height measurement, clinical/developmental/social assessment, detailed feeding or eating history, observation, and assessment-directed investigations.
investigations.rationale: Supports clinical, developmental and social assessment plus feeding observation for child feeding difficulty; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Specifies weight and height measurement, clinical/developmental/social assessment, detailed feeding or eating history, observation, and assessment-directed investigations.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Age, feeding method, textures, volume, duration, choking, vomiting, pain, growth, development, observation and clinician plan are absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for child feeding difficulty.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
